violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Rice was observed held at 130 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Vegetables were observed held at 117 degrees F. PIC reheated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/28/2023
The plumbing to the 3 bay sink is in poor repair. Leak observed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2023
